title: Korak 18

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
INF = float('inf')
adj_matrix = [
    [0, 5, 3, INF, 11, INF],
    [5, 0, 1, INF, INF, 2],
    [3, 1, 0, 1, 5, INF],
    [INF, INF, 1, 0, 9, 3],
    [11, INF, 5, 9, 0, INF],
    [INF, 2, INF, 3, INF, 0],
]

def shortest_path(matrix, start_node, target_node=None):
    n = len(matrix)
    distances = [INF] * n
    distances[start_node] = 0
    paths = [[node_no] for node_no in range(n)]
    visited = [False] * n

    for _ in range(n):
        min_distance = INF  
        current = -1  
        for node_no in range(n):  
            if not visited[node_no] and distances[node_no] < min_distance:  
                min_distance = distances[node_no]  
                current = node_no

        if current == -1:  
            break  
        visited[current] = True  

        for node_no in range(n):
            distance = matrix[current][node_no]  
            if distance != INF and not visited[node_no]:  
                new_distance = distances[current] + distance
challengeFiles.seed:
INF = float('inf')
adj_matrix = [
    [0, 5, 3, INF, 11, INF],
    [5, 0, 1, INF, INF, 2],
    [3, 1, 0, 1, 5, INF],
    [INF, INF, 1, 0, 9, 3],
    [11, INF, 5, 9, 0, INF],
    [INF, 2, INF, 3, INF, 0],
]

def shortest_path(matrix, start_node, target_node=None):
    n = len(matrix)
    distances = [INF] * n
    distances[start_node] = 0
    paths = [[node_no] for node_no in range(n)]
    visited = [False] * n

    for _ in range(n):
        min_distance = INF  
        current = -1  
        for node_no in range(n):  
            if not visited[node_no] and distances[node_no] < min_distance:  
                min_distance = distances[node_no]  
                current = node_no

        if current == -1:  
            break  
        visited[current] = True  

        for node_no in range(n):
            distance = matrix[current][node_no]  
            if distance != INF and not visited[node_no]:  
                new_distance = distances[current] + distance

tests.text: Trebalo bi da imaš izraz if koji je definisan unutra i proverava da li je new_distance manji od distances[node_no].

description:
Sada nakon izračunavanja nove moguće udaljenosti za suseda, proverite da li je bolja od onoga što je trenutno sačuvano u listi distances. Ako jeste, ažurirajte tu udaljenost.

Unutar postojećeg dela if, dodaj deklaraciju if koja proverava da li new_distance je manje od distances[node_no].

Unutar ovog novog dela uslova, ažuriraj distances[node_no] da sačuva new_distance.
